zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Constable V於大約1353年出生在英國越可爾福藍波洛時，他的父親William Constable35歲，母親Joan Fitz Hugh30歲。他於大約1381年與Margaret Skipwith結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1388年在英國越可爾被列為member of parliament。他去世於1401年1月8日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國越可爾福藍波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Constable V于大约1353年出生在英国越可爾福藍波洛时，他的父亲William Constable35岁，母亲Joan Fitz Hugh30岁。他于大约1381年与Margaret Skipwith结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1388年在英国越可爾被列为member of parliament。他去世于1401年1月8日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国越可爾福藍波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Constable V was born about 1353, in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Constable, was 35 and his mother, Joan Fitz Hugh, was 30. He married Margaret Skipwith about 1381. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. In 1388, at the age of 36, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in Yorkshire, England. He died before 8 January 1401, in his hometown, and was buried in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Constable V est né environ 1353, à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Constable, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan Fitz Hugh, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Skipwith environ 1381. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. En 1388, à l’âge de 36 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Everwyck, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 8 janvier 1401, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Constable V um 1353 in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Constable 35 und seine Mutter Joan Fitz Hugh 30. Er hat um 1381 Margaret Skipwith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1388, als er 36 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament in Yorkshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 8. Januar 1401 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Constable V è nato il circa 1353 nel Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Constable, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Joan Fitz Hugh, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Skipwith circa 1381. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1388, all'età di 36 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel Yorkshire, England. Morì prima del 8 gennaio 1401, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Flamborough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Constable Vが約1353年にイギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウで生まれた時，父William Constableは35歳，母Joan Fitz Hughは30歳であった。約1381年にMargaret Skipwithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1388年，36歳の時，イギリスヨークシュアイアでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1401年1月8日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアフランボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Constable V(이)가 대략 1353년 영국 요르크실르 플램루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Constable(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Fitz Hugh(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1381년 Margaret Skipwith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1388년, 36세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 요르크실르에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1401년 1월 8일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 플램루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Constable V nasceu aproximadamente 1353, em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Constable, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Joan Fitz Hugh, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Skipwith aproximadamente 1381. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1388, com 36 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 8 de janeiro de 1401, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Constable V родился около 1353 г. в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Constable было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Fitz Hugh, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Skipwith около 1381 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1388 году, в возрасте 36 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности еркшир, Англия. Он умер перед 8 январь 1401 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Constable V nació aproximadamente 1353, en Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Constable, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Joan Fitz Hugh, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret Skipwith aproximadamente 1381. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1388, a la edad de 36 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 8 de enero de 1401, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
